Proposed Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Nov-21-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Russell F. Brasso, Esq. 433-3475 & Mario Alioto, Esq. 563-7200 for pltf; Mark D. Lonergan, Esq. & Regina J. McClendon, Esq. 398-3344 for deft Fireside Thrift Co.; Mark A. Chavez, Esq. for objector Phillip Lewis; Francis J. Callahan, sworn & examined.
RULING: Argued and the Court approves settlement agreement. Order signed in open court.

Proposed Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Nov-16-2001 Continued To Nov-21-01 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Russell F. Brasso, Esq. 433-3475 for pltf; Mark D. Lonergan, Esq. & Regina J. McClendon, Esq. 398-3344 for deft Fireside Thrift Co.; Mark A. Chavez, Esq. & Jonathan E. Gertler, Esq. 381-5599 for objector Phillip Lewis; Francis J. Callahan, sworn & examined.
RULING: Argued and the Court continues the matter to 11/21/01 at 9:30am. All parties to meet & confer to come up with written plan; submit letter re plan by Tuesday (11/20); if objections/dispute, submit separate letter; submit revised order for approval.

App Cls Action, Atty Fee
Off Calendar Nov-30-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Russell F. Brasso, Esq. 433-3475 & Mario N. Alioto, Esq. 563-7200 for pltf; Mark D. Lonergan, Esq. & Regina J. McClendon, Esq. 398-3344 for deft Fireside Thrift Co.; Mark A. Chavez, Esq. 381-5599 for objector Phillip Lewis.
RULING: Argued and the Court continues the matter to 11/16/01 at 3:30pm. Mr. Lonergan to file declaration of Mr. Callahan by 11/13, to serve by fax.
